name: CNB
description_zh: 通过自然语言管理 CNB 平台：仓库、Issue、PR、流水线、制品库等操作。
description_en: Manage CNB platform with natural language: repositories, issues, pull requests, pipelines, artifact registry and more.
examples_zh: 获取当前 Issue 的详情
在当前 PR 上发表评论：已完成代码评审
查看当前 PR 的 CI 构建状态
给当前 Issue 添加 bug 标签
列出当前 PR 的变更文件
examples_en: Get details of the current issue
Comment on the current PR: code review completed
Check the CI build status of the current PR
Add the bug label to the current issue
List changed files in the current PR
